violations.description: TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Prep top pizza cooler and under counter cooler near pizza ovens noted with thermometer not in a conspicuous location.

STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Cleaned and sanitized utensils noted being stored in such a way that the food contact surfaces were being contaminated by debris build up in 3 drawer organizer next to pizza prep top cooler.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service noted being stored in an unprotected location. Single slice pizza trays being stored in a drawer with debris build up.
